layman_headline: Extreme fear grips the crypto market — patience is the best trade right now.
layman_explanation: The entire crypto market is in a deep slump with Bitcoin struggling around $59,500 and the Fear & Greed index at an extreme low of 15. Most altcoins have been hammered, losing 7-17% in the past week. While fear this extreme can signal buying opportunities, the charts show continued selling pressure with no clear bottom confirmed yet. Jumping in now would be like trying to catch a falling knife.
layman_action: Stay in cash and wait. The market is still falling and no coin offers a high-confidence setup right now. Watch for Bitcoin to stabilize above $60,000 before committing capital.
expert_reasoning: In an Extreme Fear environment (15/100, worsening trend), BTC is testing the critical $60K level with headlines about volatility shocks and downside hedging. High BTC dominance at 55.6% means capital is rotating out of alts. Among candidates: TAC and VELVET are parabolic (200%+ in 7 days) and far too extended. JTO is overbought at RSI 74 and already dropping 13% today. WLD's bearish marubozu and -32% weekly decline show no reversal signal yet. PEPE has Three Black Crows — actively selling off. SOL's risk/reward is just 0.12x with resistance immediately overhead. GWEI is the best setup technically but has already rallied 35% into resistance and offers only 1:1 risk/reward at current price. No candidate provides a favorable entry with clear downside protection in this environment.
risk_factors: BTC breaking below $58,000 could trigger another 10-15% cascade across all alts
Fear & Greed worsening from 12 to 15 suggests sentiment hasn't capitulated fully — more downside possible
High BTC dominance at 55.6% means alt season is far away and small caps face outsized drawdown risk
watch_list: Bitcoin's ability to hold the $58,000-$60,000 support zone over the next 48 hours
GWEI pulling back toward the $0.10-$0.11 support zone for a high-R entry
Fear & Greed index — a spike below 10 or a reversal above 20 could mark the turning point
market_context: The crypto market is in a pronounced downtrend with BTC testing the critical $60K level amid extreme fear (15/100). Sovereign funds reportedly see this as a discount, but technicals show no confirmed bottom yet — patience is warranted.
context_banner: Extreme Fear at 15/100 with BTC fighting for $60K — capital preservation takes priority over opportunity hunting until a bottom is confirmed.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 15 (Extreme Fear) and worsening — historically a contrarian buy zone but current trend suggests no capitulation bottom yet.
Bitcoin's $60K breakdown is setting up a volatility shock as traders aggressively load downside hedges, signaling institutional expectation of further decline.
Bitcoin faces a critical test as bulls aim to hold $60K — the outcome of this level will determine whether alts get a relief bounce or face another leg down.
Best candidates are either overbought (JTO at 74, TAC at 68) or still mid-range with bearish structure (PEPE at 34 with Three Black Crows), offering no clean entry.
GWEI's Morning Star pattern is the strongest bullish chart signal among candidates (bias +1.40) but risk/reward at current levels is only 1:1, requiring a pullback for proper entry.
